code:
%%{Education_ClassroomService}}}%%
mindmap
  root(Education_StudentDB))
    src/
      Entry Points
        index.ts
          Main orchestrator
          Agent execution loop
          Interrupt handling
          Metrics collection
        launch_codex_orchestrator_session.ts
          CLI launcher
          Zellij layout builder
          Process spawner
        dynamic_timeline.ts
          Real-time status
          Log aggregation
      Configuration
        agents.ts
          Agent config types
          Config loader
          Log file helpers
        agentlark.ts
          Lark compiler bridge
          Output path resolver
        orchestrator_cli.ts
          CLI argument parser
          Option types
      AI Integration
        ai/
          index.ts - Backend factory
          openai/ - Codex SDK wrapper
          anthropic/ - MiniMax client
          tools/ - Tool definitions
          instructions/ - System prompts
      Zellij
        zellij/
          cli.ts - CLI wrapper
          sessions.ts - Session & KDL
          layouts.ts - Layout builders
          tabs.ts - Tab management
          types.ts - Type definitions
        zellij_client.ts
          High-level API
      Persistence
        memory_store.ts
          Artifact CRUD
          Memory queries
        progress_tracker.ts
          Agent progress
          Snapshot management
        agentfs/
          config.ts - Settings
          hooks.ts - Event hooks
          logger.ts - Action logging
      Utilities
        cli_styles.ts
          Chalk styling
        project_root.ts
          Path resolution
        squad_status.ts
          Completion tracking
        timeline_status.ts
          Status file I/O
    rust/
      agentlark/
        DSL compiler
        Lark to JSON
    configs/
      agents.lark
        Agent definitions
        Orchestration rules
    bin/
      Compiled binaries
        codex_orchestrator
        dynamic_timeline
        launch_codex_orchestrator_session
    logs/
      Runtime logs
        Per-agent log files
        orchestrator-internal.log
        interrupt.log
    memory/
      Artifacts
        Progress snapshots
        Handoff notes
        Interrupt summaries
    scripts/
      Build utilities
        patch_turso_native.ts
        package_dist.ts
        memory_inspector.ts
        condense_memory.ts
repo_description: a multi-agent orchestration framework that autonomously decomposes complex prompts into actionable tasks through a specialized hierarchy of user-definable agents, orchestrating them across Zellij term

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Education_StudentDB设计一个完整的架构图。核心是一个mindmap，根节点叫Education_StudentDB，下面分两大块：src/源代码目录和rust/、configs/这些辅助目录。src/下面要有Entry Points、Configuration、AI Integration这些主要模块。
明白了，根节点是Education_StudentDB。Entry Points下面具体有哪些文件？我看到有index.ts、launch_codex_orchestrator_session.ts和dynamic_timeline.ts这三个入口文件对吗？
对的。index.ts是Main orchestrator，负责Agent execution loop和Interrupt handling；launch_codex_orchestrator_session.ts是CLI launcher，带Zellij layout builder；dynamic_timeline.ts做Real-time status和Log aggregation。
好的，Entry Points模块已添加。接下来Configuration下面有agents.ts、agentlark.ts和orchestrator_cli.ts，分别处理Agent配置、Lark编译器桥接和CLI参数解析。
AI Integration这块比较重要，需要展开成子目录ai/，下面分index.ts作为Backend factory，然后有openai/、anthropic/两个SDK封装，还有tools/和instructions/。
确认一下，Zellij模块需要单独列出来吗？我看到有zellij/子目录和zellij_client.ts文件，前者包含cli.ts、sessions.ts、layouts.ts这些，后者是High-level API。
没错，Zellij要单独作为一个一级模块。Persistence部分也需要细化：memory_store.ts做Artifact CRUD，progress_tracker.ts管Agent progress和Snapshot，还有agentfs/子目录放config、hooks、logger。
已添加。Utilities模块包含cli_styles.ts、project_root.ts、squad_status.ts和timeline_status.ts。根节点下还有rust/agentlark/做DSL compiler，configs/放agents.lark，以及bin/、logs/、memory/、scripts/这些运行时目录。
等等，根节点名字我刚才说错了，应该是Education_ClassroomService作为mindmap的标题注释，但根节点本身还是Education_StudentDB。另外scripts/下面要列出具体的工具脚本：patch_turso_native.ts、package_dist.ts、memory_inspector.ts、condense_memory.ts。
已修正标题注释为Education_ClassroomService，根节点保持Education_StudentDB，并补充了scripts/下的四个具体脚本文件。整个mindmap结构现在完整了。
